lines.text: I am Fenrico, the Primus of the Order of the Deep. Your deeds have reached my ears, and I have long wished to meet you. Alas, the burdens of this world delayed our meeting until now. I beg your pardon for the wait.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Please accept my respect for you—you and your troupe have shown great talent and ambition, breathing new life into Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I ask you to deliver this message to your companions: from this day forth, the troupe shall have permanent rights to perform within the city.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: All mortals stumble, but through pilgrimage, they have cleansed their souls and atoned for their transgressions. They have earned their right to return to this divinely blessed land.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I understand that questions weigh on your heart. In the presence of a just Divinity, speak freely, and I will answer with all the honesty I possess.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: By the great Sentinel Imperator, I swear to you. There shall be no deceit in my words.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: You have walked a path similar to Theirs. Indeed, you have the right to meet Them.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: However, due to the Dark Tide two decades ago, the Sentinel's body was gravely wounded and remains in a state of recovery.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: If you wish to meet Them, I will convey your request.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I see the thirst for truth in your eyes. It is clear that doubts still linger in your heart. Please, voice your concerns.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Fleurdelys... She was the emissary of the Sentinel, and we are grateful for her contributions.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Twenty years ago, during the Dark Tide, she sacrificed herself to seal the calamity. She fulfilled her duties in this world and returned to the <color=yellow>divine embrace</color>.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Do you know how the Dark Tide came into being?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: In Rinascita, wars were waged in the name of faith, tearing apart the Sentinel as our faith divided, weakening Their divine power.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Dark Tide's true essence is the divine blood shed from the Sentinel's wounds.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: That tragic past left deep scars, and with Their divine power drained, They could not prevent the Dark Tide's surge twenty years ago.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Blessed Maiden chose to martyr herself. She <color=yellow>once again</color> resonated with the Sentinel and, through her sacrifice, restored some of Their divine power, bringing an end to the Dark Tide.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Yet, the Sentinel remains in a state of healing and still requires a mortal representative. Following the Blessed Maiden's departure, I was granted new authority to cleanse the aftermath of the Dark Tide.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I received the Divinity's blessing and became the new Enlightened One. By Their will, I fulfill the tasks left unfinished in this world.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Therefore, we must unify all beliefs, ensuring the purity and unity of our will to prevent another tragedy...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I swear, my words are without deceit.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I see in your eyes that you have walked further on the path of justice than I anticipated.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: O dear Sentinel… please forgive my transgressions.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Dark Tide brought us a bloodstained lesson. To keep our people from faltering, I bound myself to silence, locking away what I witnessed on that fateful day.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Fleurdelys, the Unrighteous, deceived us all. She was not the Blessed Maiden chosen by the Sentinel... The true maiden has yet to reveal herself.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: You must know that a being capable of rivaling our Divinity exists in this world—humanity's eternal adversary, the evil of all civilizations... the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: As the Sentinel has Their Resonator, so does the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Fleurdelys was shaped—both body and spirit—by our ancient enemy. Her actions were intended to plunge this city into fear and chaos.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: This is the truth I witnessed—Fleurdelys was the <color=yellow>Threnodian's Resonator</color>.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I care not for labels of good or evil. My only care is Ragunna's order and chaos.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Fear... is but one tool among many to maintain stability.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Out of respect for our partnership, some things are better left unsaid.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Wait... You were the one who led the Poets Society to that lithograph, weren't you?
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: I've heard whispers of your presence at Whisperwind Haven around that time. Whenever you were asked, you claimed to be seeking inspiration.
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Why are you doing this?
lines.quest_name: Your Summer Will Never Wither

lines.text: Greetings, Righteous One. If unanswered questions have left you wary, allow me to guide the path before you.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: With the Divinity's blessing, I follow Their words, for I am bound to Their will.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Blasphemy! I see now how the faithless have led you astray, coaxing you to abandon the righteous path.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Rinascita must be unified and purified, for only then can its people be free from fear and division.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: As Their grace and divine will shine upon us once more, so too has Their divine power returned from the faithless lands of Septimont.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: With this power, I will unite the divided minds and build a paradise where tears no longer fall.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Join me in this great cause, Righteous One. This is also a chance to rid yourself of a foe that has long plagued you.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: The Fractsidus.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: I serve Their will. It is the only true path.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: As for the hubristic faithless, they deserve no salvation... nor will they obstruct my course...
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Despite our shared enemy, you still choose conflict over cooperation.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Absurd! I stand against it. How could I ever be its puppet?
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: O Sentinel! Return the souls in darkness to this world! Let all wills be made one!
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: My predecessors... What you taught... I...
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: "The path born of injustice must be fortified with further transgressions…"
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Hah, no, even with the body perished, hope and salvation shall endure.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Righteous One, please, save Rinascita's souls from the Paradise...
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: I heard curses... not loud, but deep... I deserve them.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Soon, It will gather enough strength to herd the people and drown Rinascita beneath the Dark Tide.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: The Gem isn't the true heart of the problem. The false Journeying Paradise has created an illusion of everlasting peace, hiding the real source of the catastrophe.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: I will remain here to stem the Dark Tide's spread.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Now, I can sense it clearly. The fluctuations from the Paradise are not in Ragunna, but in Septimont...
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: I cannot reach that far. I must rely on you to go, find, and solve the crisis there. Only then can those who abandoned their faith save their homeland.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens
